algorithm-name.description: Name or identifier of the DGA algorithm.

algorithm-version.description: Version or variant of the DGA algorithm.

counter.description: Generation counter/index for the candidate domain.

epoch.description: Epoch, date, or time input used by the DGA.

reference.description: Reference URL for algorithm analysis, source code, or campaign report.

seed.description: Seed value used by the DGA.

text.description: Additional context about DGA domain generation and usage.

tld.description: Top-level domain generated or selected by the DGA.

validity-end.description: End of expected validity window for the generated domain.

validity-start.description: Start of expected validity window for the generated domain.

description: Domain Generation Algorithm (DGA) output and generation context, including the generated domain and associated algorithm parameters (e.g. seed, epoch, TLD strategy, and malware family). Reference: https://www.usenix.org/system/files/conference/usenixsecurity16/sec16_paper_plohmann.pdf.
name: dga-domain
